rows.label: qev085303_MSG0001
rows.name: Are you Libro Cole from Landbank?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0002
rows.name: Yes, that's me. And you are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0003
rows.name:
We came to rescue you based on a
rescue request from Kias-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0004
rows.name:
Doing unnecessary things... Has
that guy already gone back?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0005
rows.name: Yeah. Leaving you behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0006
rows.name: So he was faster, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0007
rows.name:
That's not the point for you either,
is it?! You were left behind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0008
rows.name:
Cole Family Precept Number
Four: Once you've achieved your
objective, go home quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0009
rows.name:
Kias said the exact same thing! What
kind of education did you give him?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0010
rows.name: Do you have weapons on you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0011
rows.name: Eh, of course we do, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0012
rows.name: Perfect timing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0013
rows.name:
This cave is swarming with
native creatures. I haven't
been able to secure the ore yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0014
rows.name: Won't you go gather it for me for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0015
rows.name: Were you even listening to us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0016
rows.name:
Cole Family Precept Number
Two: Even if you end up alone,
accomplish your objective.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0017
rows.name:
Securing Flemtide is indispensable
for NLA's development.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0018
rows.name:
We just heard that too.
That's why it's not—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0019
rows.name: It's fine, let's just listen to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0020
rows.name: Colonel Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0021
rows.name:
They have their own mission.
If there's something we can
support them with, we should.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0022
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0023
rows.name:
Flemtide is a flame-like red
ore. It should be in various
places inside this cave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085303_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you're going to help, search
the cave thoroughly for me.[ST:wait ]
